title: prophecy.verified body
description: Body shape for `kind: prophecy.verified` records. Written by Apollo.consult_due() when a prediction's verify() callable runs at or past horizon.

prediction.description: The unique name of the prediction.

horizon.description: ISO date or null — when the prediction was due.

accepted.description: Outcome — true if verify() returned True, false if False, null if verification raised.

error.description: Error detail if verify() raised, else null.
